reviews.comment:
Se demoran mucho en atender, mientras pueden colocar el surtidor a otro auto en vez de hacer eso, se ponen a limpiar el vidrio del que ya cargó, un desastre. Tardan mucho, cambien de personal, hay mucha gente que necesita y quiere trabajar

(Translated by Google)
They take forever to serve you. While they could be pumping gas for another car, instead of doing that, they start cleaning the windshield of the one that just filled up—it's a disaster. They're incredibly slow; they need to change their staff. There are plenty of people who need and want to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXOGZDYVVREAE
